offer: For property managers processing 10–50 rental properties/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
problem: Manual reconciliation of rent payments leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for rent data and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
